description.en: Retrieve the conversation history of a cloud agent, including all user prompts and assistant responses.
description.de: Ruft den Konversationsverlauf eines Cloud-Agenten ab, einschließlich aller Benutzer-Prompts und Assistenten-Antworten.
description.es: Retrieve the conversation history of a cloud agent, including all user prompts and assistant responses.
description.fr: Retrieve the conversation history of a cloud agent, including all user prompts and assistant responses.
description.ro: Retrieve the conversation history of a cloud agent, including all user prompts and assistant responses.
description.it: Retrieve the conversation history of a cloud agent, including all user prompts and assistant responses.

vars.API_KEY: env:CURSOR_API_KEY|Get your API key from Cursor Dashboard at https://cursor.com/settings/api

description.en: Unique identifier for the cloud agent (e.g., 'bc_abc123').
description.es: Unique identifier for the cloud agent (e.g., 'bc_abc123').
description.fr: Unique identifier for the cloud agent (e.g., 'bc_abc123').
description.ro: Unique identifier for the cloud agent (e.g., 'bc_abc123').
description.it: Unique identifier for the cloud agent (e.g., 'bc_abc123').

success.en: Retrieved conversation for agent {{AGENT_ID}} with {{MESSAGES.length}} message(s).
success.de: Konversation für Agent {{AGENT_ID}} mit {{MESSAGES.length}} Nachricht(en) abgerufen.
success.es: Retrieved conversation for agent {{AGENT_ID}} with {{MESSAGES.length}} message(s).
success.fr: Retrieved conversation for agent {{AGENT_ID}} with {{MESSAGES.length}} message(s).
success.ro: Retrieved conversation for agent {{AGENT_ID}} with {{MESSAGES.length}} message(s).
success.it: Retrieved conversation for agent {{AGENT_ID}} with {{MESSAGES.length}} message(s).
